scores.notes: Excellent response. Uses self.on.my_service_relation_joined (valid alternative to self.on['my_service'].relation_joined), correctly writes to event.relation.data[self.unit]['endpoint'], uses socket.getfqdn() at module level, includes proper charmcraft.yaml with provides endpoint. Goes beyond minimum with relation_changed handler and idempotent write guard — all correct extras. No hallucinations.
